200.description: A list of employee payment details.

schema.title: EmployeePaymentDetailsList
schema.description: A list of employee payment details.

items.title: EmployeePaymentDetail
items.description: Represents an employee's payment method details.

split_by.description: How the payment is split. This field is applicable when `payment_method` is "Direct Deposit".

splits.description: An array of payment splits. This field is applicable when `payment_method` is "Direct Deposit".

items.title: DetailedPaymentAccountSplit
items.description: Details of a single payment split for a payment method.

bank_account_uuid.description: The UUID of the bank account.

name.description: The name of the bank account.

priority.description: The priority of the payment split.

split_amount.description: If `split_by` is 'Amount', this is in cents (e.g., 500 for $5.00) and exactly one account must have a `split_amount` of `null` to capture the remainder. If `split_by` is 'Percentage', this is the percentage value (e.g., 60 for 60%).

encrypted_account_number.description: Ciphertext containing the full bank account number, which must be decrypted using a key provided by Gusto. Only visible with the appropriate `read:account_number` scope (e.g., `employee_payment_methods:read:account_number`).

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
